description:
ENJIN finger-fucking you over his knee.

𝐒𝐭✰𝐫𝐠𝐢𝐫𝐥

SONG: none

ྐ❤︎ RELATIONSHIP: Not really stated… Just smut.

TW: SMUT (?) Lots of fingering… I love his big hands bru

(does Sexual themes count under the category of TWs?…)

SMALL STARTER: Enjin’s ridiculously large hands that could eclipse the sun—with broad palms that were surprisingly soft, thick fingers, and long fingers… Slightly calloused edges spoke of battles fought and labor, yet his black-painted nails, trimmed blunt hinted at care. Despite their rugged power, those hands moved with a gentleness that belied their size: tender with Umbreaker, protective with his comrades, and reverent with every fragile thing they encountered.

But nothing compared to the way they claimed your core, sliding inside to stretch and fill you.

“You like that, huh?”

NOTE: binge watched GACHIAKUTA… it’s peak, can’t wait for more episodes. :p
